problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
